title: EVO-STIK GRIPFILL Buff - 350ml - Gap-Filling Adhesive - Bonds Almost Any Surface
features: EVO-STIK GRIPFILL is a multi-purpose, high-strength gap filling adhesive that's specially formulated to stick a wide range of building materials
Thanks to its gap filling qualities, it can be used on uneven surfaces
Suitable for interior and exterior use (provided bond is covered)
Suitable materials: Wood, plasterboard, tiles, stone, metal, breeze blocks, bricks, ceramic, concrete, UPVC and more
Contents: 1x EVO-STIK GRIPFILL Gap Filling Adhesive, Bonds almost any surface, Colour: Buff, 350ml
description: From the manufacturer EVO-STIK GRIPFILL Gap Filling Adhesive Multi-purpose, high-strength gap filling adhesive EVO-STIK GRIPFILL is a multi-purpose, high-strength gap filling adhesive. It’s suitable for interior and exterior use (provided the bond is covered) and is specially formulated to stick a wide range of building materials including wood, plasterboard, tiles, stone, metal, breeze blocks, bricks, ceramic, concrete, UPVC and more. Thanks to its gap filling qualities, it can even be used on uneven surfaces. Suitable use & materials Wood, plasterboard, tiles, stone, metal, breeze blocks, bricks, ceramic, concrete, UPVC and more. Coverage 12 metres of 6mm bead per 350ml cartridge. Advantages at a glance: EVO-STIK GRIPFILL Gap Filling Adhesive Will bond most building materials Superior final bond strength Suitable for interior and exterior use Colour: Buff 350ml EVO-STIK Sticks Like Turbo Adhesive EVO-STIK Strong Stuff Adhesive Squeeze Tube - White EVO-STIK GRIPFILL Solvent Free Adhesive EVO-STIK GRIPFILL XTRA Multi-purpose Adhesive EVO-STIK Strong Stuff Waterproof Adhesive EVO-STIK Serious Stuff Liquid Metal - White Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,154 4.4 out of 5 stars 220 4.4 out of 5 stars 340 4.4 out of 5 stars 2,326 4.5 out of 5 stars 566 4.4 out of 5 stars 17 Description High performance, fast setting grab adhesive High performance adhesive with a strong, instant hold Multi-purpose, high strength gap filling adhesive Multi-purpose, high strength instant grip adhesive Waterproof adhesive that will bond to wet surfaces inside or outside the home… even underwater!
